charter: v0_master_prompt: CXO demo-ready, full desktop parity, all discipline gates green.
architecture: Next.js 16 / React 19 / Tailwind v4 browser -> local FastAPI agent (127.0.0.1:7842). Browser never holds secrets. ADO/Jira writes mocked in testing.
convergence_status: CONVERGED. Pass 2 found+fixed one real P1 (TT-002). Pass 3 (deep dialog-interaction sweep + post-fix re-verify) found zero new P0/P1 and confirmed the fix live (crash=0, vault rendered). All discipline gates green.

issues.title: List endpoints crash consumers on malformed/partial agent payloads
issues.repro: Open Credentials dialog when GET /credentials/{project} returns a body without the 'credentials' array (older/partial agent response).
issues.actual: Uncaught TypeError (creds.length on undefined) crashed the ENTIRE app.
issues.notes: Added '?? []' guards to listCredentials, upsertCredential, deleteCredential, e2eTestCases, e2eEnvironments, retrieval chunks (matching the codebase's existing convention). Added 4 vitest regression cases (mock fetch -> assert []). Re-verified live: Credentials dialog now renders the vault table (QA / url / qa_user) with no crash. Full dialog sweep (KB, Retrieval, E2E, Defect, Upload, Package, Settings, Custom Generate, Help menu) all open crash-free.

issues.title: Light theme appeared not to apply in browser screenshots
issues.repro: Toggle to light; capture screenshot via agent-browser.
issues.expected: Light palette renders (off-white bg, white cards, dark text).
issues.actual: Screenshots rendered dark in both modes.
issues.notes: Disproven via getComputedStyle: body bg resolves #f4f6f9, --card #fff, text rgb(26,29,38) in light mode. The .light class is correctly applied to <html> and tokens switch. Root cause of the visual was an agent-browser screenshot capture artifact (renders dark palette regardless of active theme), NOT an app defect. Theme correctness confirmed by computed styles.

verified_journeys: BoardGrid: 8 columns, lane grouping, type/state badges, filters (type/assignee/sprint/column)
DetailPane: description, acceptance criteria, area/iteration, add-tag, related work items
GenerateDialog opens with correct WI count + custom ADO target fields + manual-mode fallback; NO fast-model toggle (regression fix confirmed live)
StatusBar: CPU/RAM/Data metrics + NW/AI/ADO/KB dots + agent version chip
residual_risks: Real AI-generate path (live LLM) not exercisable in-sandbox (no API key); covered by mock contract + committed vitest/pytest. Ceiling: needs a keyed agent for true live verification.
Live ADO/Jira API behavior not exercised (mock proves contract + payload shape, not live tenant behavior). By design: no live writes permitted.
Playwright browser E2E suite cannot run live in sandbox (no chromium); committed as deterministic scripts + mock harness.
agent-browser screenshot tool renders dark palette regardless of active theme; theme verified via computed styles instead.

LLM key protection ceiling: bundled encrypted .env.enc is obfuscation, not true secrecy (agent decrypts on user machine). Rotatable; server proxy path remains available if team admin lifts the SSO wall.
